case_title: BETHPAGE FEDERAL CREDIT UNION vs. AGIESTA, THOMAS L.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF FOR APPLICATION OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETHPAGE FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SERVED AUG-12-2001, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT AGIESTA, THOMAS L.
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETHPAGE FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT AGIESTA, THOMAS L.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. A WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON SEPTEMBER 24, 2001, IF NO MOTION IS FILED BY DEFENDANT.
NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETHPAGE FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETHPAGE FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGIESTA, THOMAS L. $4,594.22 PRINCIPAL, $1,403.56 INTEREST, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,098.78 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
